query:
-- 1. Set Infinitea Trading (C9024) as parent for all Little Cha sites EXCEPT Bateau Bay
UPDATE customers 
SET parentCustomerExternalId = 'C9024'
WHERE name LIKE 'Little Cha%' AND externalId != 'C0140';

-- 2. Set Joshelley (C9025) as the businessName for Nicki's (it already is JOSHELLEY PTY LTD)
-- The display name stays as-is. Just ensure businessName is set correctly.
UPDATE customers 
SET businessName = 'Joshelley Pty Ltd'
WHERE externalId = 'C2893';

-- 3. Set Bel's Resto Pty Ltd as businessName for Poppy G's Midland
UPDATE customers 
SET businessName = "Bel's Resto Pty Ltd"
WHERE externalId = 'C0186';

-- 4. Reassign Torquay service S0340 from Hervey Bay Garden Centre to Allegra Property Management (C0011)
UPDATE services 
SET customerExternalId = 'C0011', customerName = 'Allegra Property Management Pty Ltd'
WHERE externalId = 'S0340';

-- 5. Mark the Tewantin golf club service (BU301770 - 46A Cooroy Noosa Rd, Tewantin) as terminated
-- It's the ABB service at Tewantin location
UPDATE services 
SET status = 'terminated'
WHERE locationAddress LIKE '%Tewantin%' OR locationAddress LIKE '%TEWANTIN%';
